objective: Add rafka-registry binary — 4th and final node type. Joins mesh as passive peer, completes gateway/broker/compute/registry lattice.
in_scope: registry/ binary — clone of compute/; name=rafka-registry, bin=rafka-registry
4-service Jaeger: broker, compute, gateway, registry all visible
registry peers with all 3 other nodes (full mesh)
exit_criteria: Jaeger services: broker, compute, gateway, registry DONE
registry emits rafka.mesh.peer.connected for gateway, broker, AND compute peer_ids DONE
registry emits rafka.mesh.frame.received (pings from gateway) DONE
